patches.purpose: Define the API-29 Bionic target and Android-only native dependencies without changing desktop targets.
requiredEvidence: ELF target and DT_NEEDED allowlist inspection

patches.purpose: Compile Android startup checks, updater execution, update prompts, and mutable announcements out of the Happy-managed artifact.
requiredEvidence: Android-target behavior tests reject codex update
Android-target behavior tests expose no startup update action
network trace contains no updater or announcement request

patches.purpose: Keep subprocess and arg0 re-exec paths bound to the canonical packaged ELF rather than a relocatable shell wrapper.
Use the Android certificate-root contract for remote MCP without changing non-Android authentication behavior.
requiredEvidence: cold-start HTTPS MCP probe reaches a protocol response
provider and MCP credentials remain private

patches.purpose: Provide the Bionic openpty compatibility implementation required for command streaming and interruption.
requiredEvidence: PTY stdin and stdout stream on Android
PTY resize, interrupt, termination, and cleanup pass
